persona.name: Api Setup - Control
persona.summary: A more specific control variant of the api setup archetype, focused on how api setup gets operationalized day to day.
goals: Keep api setup moving without extra handoffs
Make technical role easier to manage across the team
Strengthen control so the process stays repeatable
Push control farther without losing the parent archetype
pains: Runs into friction around api setup
Loses time when work depends on manual cleanup
Needs less churn in control
Gets bogged down when control is under-specified
motivations: Wants a workflow that stays reliable under pressure
Wants less operational noise and fewer surprises
Wants confidence that control will not create more cleanup
Needs control to feel concrete and reusable
objections: Will not adopt anything that adds brittle overhead
Will reject a solution that makes control harder to manage
Does not want control to become abstract strategy
decision_triggers: Clear proof that api setup flows are stable
Evidence the workflow reduces manual follow-up for control
sample_quotes: We need control to be concrete, not hand-wavy.
The parent idea is fine, but control is where the work happens.

journey_stages.mindset: Looking for a simpler way to keep work moving.
Needs confidence the tool will not add more cleanup.
